title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Udon Prisoners, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Udon Prisoners
dialogue.text: Dammit, they're only aiming at the prisoners!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GwaA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: DAM IT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I got hit...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I feel SO HOT!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Help me!! It's spread- ing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WAAH!! Don't get close to him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's So Hooto??!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, that's right... I forgot to tell you the name of that infectious disease...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It causes a high fever that sprouts from the area of infection....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and an unbearable pain as if your body is on fire!! Blood comes spurting right out....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: AaaaaA!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how much they thrash around... they will continue to suffer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: UWA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyone that touches them will be forced to suffer as well.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look!! That is what happens to those who are infected!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're all dried up now, like withered plants!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's one of Master Queen's greatest Crea- Tions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The mysterious disease... the "Mummy" virus!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: CHARGE!! You're now all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I am not sure if

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Walking Human Weapons That Can defeat enemies with a mere touch!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rest of you, charge at them as well!! Do you want to be branded as a Rebel!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: After all that's hap- pened...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The prisoners of UDon are Still our enemies!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: PLEASE... LEAVE THIS PLACE...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you guys had not come here... none of this would have happened..."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if the lot of you... are truly samural of the Red Scabbards...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The following performance

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that were supposed to have died 20 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You still will not be able to win.....!!!...Kaido... that gigantic flying dragon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with him around, no one will be able to defeat the beasts pirates....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look around you...! With just a single weapon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: created by just one of his subordi- Nates...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the devastation that has been brought upon us...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Look at this over- whilelining power.....!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: precisely!! If you outsiders never came here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We would have continued to live our normal daily lives...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The following

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We would have never been subjected to this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No!! You must not touch them, Luffy- Taro...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Spread...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: BlOTCH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stop Right There, All of You!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HUJUH!!!?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 46 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
